name: Miniature Scaramouches
description:
You’ve made three small ball-jointed dolls, each around ten inches in height. Kabukimono, Scaramouche and Wanderer. Except… somehow they’ve come alive?!

 (NSFW version) (Yes you can fuck them. I know you were wondering it, you freaky fellows… if you want SFW version you can find it on here too)
creator: Sadtoast
